creator: rafi@guengel.ch
text:
- Port update to 0.6.
- Additional option in OPTIONS.
- Patches from files/ directory no longer needed. Incorporated in upstream.
- Installation of documentation files handled in Port Makefile in order to cut down the number of files installed (Upstream Makefile took care earlier).

Updated Files
--------------
Makefile
distinfo
pkg-descr
pkg-plist

New Files
---------
(none)

Deleted Files
-------------
files/patch-Makefile.am
files/patch-configure.ac
files/patch-doc-Makefile.am
files/

How-To-Repeat: n/a
